scripts.dev: TUNIQ_RELAY_SHARED_SECRET=dev-local-shared-secret TUNIQ_APP_URL=http://localhost:10180 PUBLIC_BASE_DOMAIN=tuniq.dev bun --filter web dev & TUNIQ_RELAY_SHARED_SECRET=dev-local-shared-secret TUNIQ_APP_URL=http://localhost:10180 PUBLIC_BASE_DOMAIN=tuniq.dev bun --filter @tuniq/relay dev & VITE_TUNIQ_APP_URL=http://localhost:10180 VITE_TUNIQ_RELAY_URL=ws://localhost:10181/agent bun --filter desktop tauri dev & wait
scripts.build: bun --filter web build && bun --filter @tuniq/relay build && bun --filter desktop build
